name: LPL Financial Holdings Inc.
business: LPL Financial Holdings Inc. is the largest independent broker-dealer, a leading investment advisory firm, and a top custodian. It supports over 32,000 financial advisors and approximately 1,200 financial institutions, servicing and custodying $2.4 trillion in assets. The firm provides advisor affiliation models, investment solutions, fintech tools, and practice management services.
sellsTo: financial institutions (banks, credit unions, insurance companies)

exposures.sentence: The firm provides a wide range of advisor affiliation models, investment solutions, fintech tools and practice management services

A cyber-attack or other security breach of our technology systems or those of our advisors or third-party vendors could negatively impact our normal operations and, as a result, subject us to significant liability and harm our reputation.

catalysts.event: Completion of conversion of assets from Commonwealth Equity Services (CES) to LPL Financial platform
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to complete the conversion of assets from CES in the fourth quarter of 2026 and withdraw the related registrations of that entity thereafter.
